overall.description: A cinematic sequence from a survival horror video game featuring a Victorian mansion during a stormy afternoon. The camera approaches the mansion through a garden, passes a hunched character, circles to reveal the grand front facade, then retreats through iron gates to the cobblestone street.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the garden path toward the mansion side entrance

notable_agents.action: hunched humanoid figure standing near the large oak tree ahead

entered.detail: white Victorian mansion with round porch and stone columns visible on the right side
tall red brick wall running along the left side of the path
narrow dirt and grass path leading through the garden
massive oak tree with hanging moss dominating the garden center
tree with pink blossoms visible to the right of the path
well-maintained green hedge along the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a garden path beside a Victorian mansion during a rainy afternoon. A brick wall and trimmed hedge line the left side while the mansion's columned porch is visible on the right. In the distance, a hunched figure stands near a large oak tree.

events.description: hunched character runs past camera from right to left, crossing the lawn

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a character passes by on the left side

notable_agents.action: hunched zombie-like figure running across the lawn from right to left

entered.detail: black ornate street lamp post standing in the garden
smaller residential house visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward as the garden opens up. A hunched character runs past from right to left across the lawn. The mansion's front corner comes into view ahead, and a street lamp stands in the center of the garden area.

events.description: camera stops approaching front steps and begins pulling backward to reveal full mansion facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the front entrance then pulling back to view the entire mansion structure

entered.detail: curved stone staircase leading up to the mansion's front door
ornate white balcony with railing on the second floor above the entrance
gabled roof with chimneys and decorative trim visible against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand front entrance with its curved stone steps and tall columns, then pulls back to reveal the full facade of the Victorian mansion. The second-floor balcony and ornate roof details become visible against the dark storm clouds.

events.description: camera pulls back through the front iron gates, transitioning from garden to street entrance

agents.ego_description: retreating backward through the mansion's front iron gates toward the street

entered.detail: tall black iron gate post with decorative finial on the left
tall black iron gate post with decorative finial on the right
black wrought iron fence extending from the gate posts
black wrought iron fence extending from the gate posts

segments.scene_description: The camera continues pulling back, revealing the full scale of the mansion framed by the front gates. The ornate iron gate posts and fence come into the foreground as the mansion recedes into the background, showing the complete facade with its symmetrical wings.

events.description: camera turns and moves along the wet cobblestone street away from the mansion

agents.ego_description: moving along the rain-slicked cobblestone street away from the mansion

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the overcast sky
row of residential houses lining the right side of the street
mature trees with white-painted trunks lining both sides of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the wet cobblestone street, leaving the mansion behind. The iron fence continues along the left side while neighboring houses and tree-lined sidewalks define the residential street. The mansion fades into the distance as the camera proceeds down the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the intimate confines of a rainy garden and gradually retreats to reveal the imposing scale of a Victorian mansion and its surrounding street. It begins by gliding along a garden path beside a brick wall and trimmed hedge, moving toward a hunched figure standing beneath a distant oak tree. As the garden opens up, the figure darts across the lawn past a central street lamp, leading the camera toward the grand front entrance with its curved stone steps and tall columns. The scene then shifts as the camera pulls back to reveal the full ornate facade and symmetrical wings against dark storm clouds, eventually framing the entire estate through the ornate iron gate posts. Finally, the camera recedes further onto a wet cobblestone street, leaving the mansion behind as it proceeds past neighboring houses and tree-lined sidewalks.
